loop1.title: Thermal Life
loop1.note: Showing active power as a proxy for thermal stress and loss, as direct temperature columns are not present in the meter's schema.

loop1.title: Thermal Timeline
loop1.note: Showing load factor and efficiency trends from active/apparent power; thermal temperatures (hotspot, oil, winding) are not measured by this meter and are honestly blanked.

loop1.title: Life & Capacity
loop1.note: Showing load factor and apparent power as proxies for thermal aging and capacity utilization; specific insulation aging (hotspot temp) is not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Insulation Aging & Loss of Life
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for thermal aging stress — true FAA (Hotspot Temperature) is not measured by this meter.
